name: WfMerge
description: Bus merger, the routing-family chain tail: recombines the Main and AUX buses and always clears AUX. Mode DUAL or SWAP assigns the two paths to the output jacks (SWAP crossed, required after a WfSwap); MIX sums them on the Main and AUX levels. FtSw A/B turns the footswitch into a seamless A/B selector between the two paths. Original effect by Waveformer.

params.name: Mode
params.explanation: DUAL: Main to the L jack, AUX to the R. SWAP: the same, crossed (required after a WfSwap). MIX: both summed into one stereo image.

params.name: Main
params.explanation: Level of the Main bus. 100 is unity.

params.name: AUX
params.explanation: Level of the AUX bus. 100 is unity.

params.name: FtSw
params.explanation: BYP: the footswitch bypasses normally. A/B: it selects which path you hear, as a seamless crossfade.
